div.head: 264. Editorial Note
div.p: On June 17, the Operations Coordinating Board reviewed and revised the OCB Operations Plan for Greece. The Operations Plan adopted on June 17 made further minor revisions of the text of the Operations Plan of May 21, 1958 (Document 241). The text of the Operations Plan adopted on June 17, which is dated June 24, is in Department of State, OCB Files: Lot 62 D 430, Greece. In addition, the Board discussed the problem of rising Greek defense costs. Minutes of the June 17 board meeting are Ibid., Minutes VII.
